target_system: Draft a source-grounded chapter mechanism from a compact source note set.
compact_seed: source note IDs plus outline contract
rule_system: preserve support-state discipline, cite source IDs, and record residuals
memory_state: public source notes and chapter outline only
residual_channel: no benchmark proves generated prose quality
verification_contract: local validators and human review can inspect source IDs and non-claims
governance_interface: support state remains argument until evidence changes
generative_leverage: small source-note set guides a longer chapter draft
fallback_path: retain full source notes and mark unresolved claims as residuals
